author: Joshua Gould
plan:
## ImputeMissingValues.KNN GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
ImputeMissingValues.KNN is a GenePattern module that Imputes missing values

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 5 parameters:
- Required: data.filename, k, rowmax, colmax, output.file
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<R2.5> <libdir>impute.R impute <data.filename> <k> <rowmax> <colmax> <output.file> <libdir>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: data.filename
parameters.description: Data file (missing values are stored as NA) - .gct

parameters.name: k
parameters.description: Number of neighbors to be used in the imputation

parameters.name: rowmax
parameters.description: The maximum percent missing data allowed in any row

parameters.name: colmax
parameters.description: The maximum percent missing data allowed in any column

parameters.name: output.file
parameters.description: The name of the output file - .gct
